run_summary.summary: Light day — one new email since yesterday's run. Hana at Taskmetas replied to Liz's HelloFresh follow-up: brand is still building their creator list and will reach out when opportunities open up. Updated last_contact and pushed the follow-up date out 6 weeks. Everything else was either already captured in yesterday's run (BHG, Whisker, xTool, SOJOS, Ollie's, Rust-Oleum, Govee, Ollny) or not deal-relevant (Remonte/Rieker are gifted-only; Hawke Media thread is about paid social ads management).

suggestions.message: HelloFresh has been in the 'still deciding' stage since early February. Now April 16 and Hana is still saying they're building the list. This is a very slow-moving lead — worth keeping but low priority. If nothing by late May, consider archiving.

deals.next_action: Wait for Hana at Taskmetas to confirm creator list is finalized
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Hana at Taskmetas replied — HelloFresh brand is still making their creator list. She'll reach out when there are updates for us.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Hana replied — HelloFresh still building creator list, no timeline given. Next check-in: late May.
